DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Empty target directory for the new MetaWeave workspace.
Creates a new workspace with the MetaWeave model and validates it.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Local model alias used by bindings.
Strong suggestions require exact property-name alignment plus complete and unique resolution.
Weak suggestions cover role-style suffix matches and cases where one source property resolves to more than one eligible target.
Loads referenced workspaces and validates that every bound source property resolves exactly once in the target model.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. MetaWeave workspace to materialize from.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Empty target directory for the materialized workspace.
Checks the weave, calls core workspace merge on the referenced workspaces, and materializes weave bindings as in-workspace relationships.
